response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years of experience, solid craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD), and some high-scale systems exposure (low-latency ad-tech services handling millions of requests per second). However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position centered on experimentation and growth measurement platforms, and the resume shows no experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis, nor evidence of leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives at principal scope. The profile reads as a hands-on senior/staff generalist rather than a platform architect in this domain.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and embedded, with required-language proficiency (JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, C#, C/C++)
High-scale distributed-systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency async services)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source authorship, and developer tooling including AI-agent/MCP infrastructure
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core domain of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: leading multi-team architecture initiatives, cross-org influence, or platforms adopted by multiple teams
Limited evidence of data/statistical analysis, metrics design, or telemetry infrastructure work

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals and scale experience
